# Available Data Types Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize available online/offline/HR-service data type mapping before broader shared ownership. `pmd-public-surface-platform-policy.json` pins the current shared-owned deterministic planning surface: PMD measurement names, public data type projection, HR-service availability, and public-to-PMD lookup. `available-data-types-readiness.json` is consumed by `AvailableDataTypesCommonPolicyTest.kt`, `PolarRuntimePlannerAdapterTest.kt`, and `PolarDataUtilsTest.swift` to keep Android, iOS, and shared coverage aligned while PMD feature reads, HR service discovery, platform public enum projection, BLE transport execution, SwiftPM/watchOS fallback, and availability-query public error translation stay platform-owned.
